title: 0817_TO_1022 OTA  !
description:
Update notes:

1. Updated the security patch and Google applications.
2. Fixed the issue which failed to set ringtones separately for dual SIM cards.
3. Fixed the issue of VoLTE not work in SmarTone network.
4. Fixed the issue of no call logs after calling 112 without a SIM card.
5. Fixed the issue which failed to send sms /mms when changing a new SIM card.
6. Fixed some language display issues of the weather widget.
7. Fixed the issue of no notification when receiving the Broadcasts.
